name: box-host
description: Agent-less docker-in-docker host: a Management shell that spins isolated boxes via rs-sandbox.
greeting:
Box-host — agent-less docker-in-docker host.

This Management shell runs NO agent: it has the authority to create, discard,
and inspect isolated boxes, but never runs an LLM itself. Boxes are clean,
locked-egress containers for running untrusted code (e.g. security-checking a
repo before you clone it into a real project).

Manage boxes with the `rs-sandbox` CLI:
  rs-sandbox            show usage
  rs-sandbox create     spin a new box (--browser for a Playwright box)
  rs-sandbox list       list boxes and their state
  rs-sandbox discard    tear a box down

The Editor tab is your artifact-management surface for box outputs.
